case_title: BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. SFH OPTICAL ATELIER DMITRI A STESENKO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO
RETURN MAIL - SENT TO PLAINTIFF UNABLE TO FORWARD - CONTINUE ORDER -
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $59.00) SERVED JAN-29-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SFH OPTICAL ATELIER DMITRI A STESENKO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,700.00 FILED BY BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT SFH OPTICAL ATELIER DMITRI A STESENKO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE.NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED 4/9/13 TO DEFENDANT SFH OPTICAL ATELIER DMITRI A STESENKO, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/UNABLE TO FORWARE".

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO APR-09-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DELIA AGUILAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-22-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-05-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DELIA AGUILAR--AR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED 1/22/13 TO DEFENDANT SFH OPTICAL ATELIER DMITRI A STESENKO, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
